title: Observation
description: Represents a clinical observation or measurement for a patient, including vital signs, lab results, imaging findings, and clinical notes.

reference_range.description: The normal or expected range for this observation value.

low.description: Lower bound of the reference range.

high.description: Upper bound of the reference range.

text.description: Human-readable description of the reference range.

resource_type.description: Fixed resource type identifier for this schema.

id.description: Unique identifier for the observation record. UUID recommended.

patient_id.description: Reference to the patient this observation belongs to.

encounter_id.description: Reference to the encounter during which this observation was recorded.

category.description: The high-level category of the observation.

effective_date.description: Date and time when the observation was clinically effective or measured.

value.description: The observed value. Can be a number, string, boolean, or structured object depending on the observation type.

value_type.description: Hint for the semantic type of the value field. Helps LLMs and parsers interpret the value correctly without type inference. 'quantity' = numeric with unit, 'text' = free text or narrative, 'boolean' = yes/no result, 'ratio' = e.g. titer 1:128, 'range' = value expressed as a range, 'coded' = value from a controlled vocabulary, 'attachment' = reference to external data.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the observed value.

interpretation.description: Clinical interpretation of the observation value relative to reference ranges.

notes.description: Additional notes or context about the observation.
